column1: <!-- This file is generated from W3C WAI ARRM data. Do not edit manually. -->

column4: Cognitive function tests that do not rely on object recognition or personal content must provide an alternative non-cognitive method or an assistive mechanism.
A cognitive function test during authentication is not required unless an alternative non-cognitive method or an assistive mechanism is provided.
Timing is not an essential part of the event or activity presented by the content.
